title: Customizable Darkmode Admin Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Customizable Darkmode Admin Dashboard Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup. ### 🎨 Color Palette * `#B7D7CD` * `#C06C88` * `#411C56` * `#2c3e50` ### 📐 Target Design Mockup Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing. ### 📌 Target Design SVG Source The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge): ```xml
Column 1 Column 2 Column 3
Data 1 Data 2 Data 3
``` ### ⚙️ Requirements 1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup. 2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive. 3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the provided colors for styling
Must include dynamic filtering with a select dropdown
Must have active card selection with state updates

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Customizable Darkmode Admin Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify dynamic filtering, active card selection, and state updates.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
